title: pleuridium angustatum
intro: Pleuridium angustatum, also known as the narrow-leaved Pleuridium or narrow-leaved moss, is a type of pleurocarpous moss. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pleuridium angustatum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Pleuridium angustatum can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential applications.
